items.title: Airport and Reserve reliability Release
items.description: Release of airport and reserve reliability improvements aimed at moving ETA accuracy and request-to-trip conversion, anchored in better constrained-location dispatch, scheduling confidence, and trip-state communication across rider and driver surfaces.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve ETA accuracy by strengthening reserve, airport, and pickup guidance behavior.
Increase reliable trip completion for time-sensitive trips, especially airport journeys.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase conversion by reducing missed pickups, rematches, and rider cancellation anxiety.

productBricks.change: Released more resilient rematch and constrained-zone dispatch behavior.
Released better airport pickup guidance and ETA quality models.
Released stronger reserve fulfillment and airport operating rules.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed rider and driver mobile updates for reserve and airport flows.
Deployed new scheduling and dispatch services in production.

items.title: Driver earnings clarity and trust Release
items.description: Release of driver earnings clarity and trust improvements aimed at moving driver earnings per active hour and driver retention through cleaner earnings explanations, lower compliance surprises, and faster support routing.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve productive earnings by reducing wasted active time and making incentives easier to act on.
Increase retention by lowering trust-eroding friction in payouts and compliance.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve supply health in focus markets by reducing avoidable churn.

productBricks.change: Released clearer driver-status and compliance workflows.
Released more legible payout and fare-breakdown experiences.
Released faster trust and incident-routing workflows for driver issues.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed driver app updates for earnings and support flows.
Deployed shared analytics and trust dashboards for supply operations.
